title: strychnos solerederi
intro: Strychnos solerederi, also known as the African strychnine tree or Strychnos, is a species of plant in the family Loganiaceae. This plant is known for its toxic properties, particularly containing the alkaloid strychnine, which can be used as a medication in small doses. The medicinal properties of Strychnos solerederi are primarily used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tincture or infusion, which can be used to treat various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation.
